programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Panic spreads when more Bukit Tinggi residents are injured by killer litter, and things turn personal when Cherril and Noel's home is broken into.

programme.title: Fire Country S1
programme.desc: Bode and his fellow prison inmate firefighters band together with the civilian station 42 crew to battle a monstrous fire that erupts after a plane crash. Meanwhile, the crews welcome a new member to the family.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Password US - Series 2
programme.desc: Iconic word-guessing gameshow Password returns with The Tonight Show host Jimmy Fallon as one the celebrity players accompanied by Nope actress Keke Palmer as host. Contestants face off in the ultimate game of words, competing to win up to 25,000 by guessing a secret password from only single-word clues.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Arts 21
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Lion Mums S4
programme.desc: Reza, Beng Hian and Marcus find themselves in the precarious position of trying to mend the ties between Min Yi and Durrani. Nabillah refuses to go for therapy to deal with her trauma from the past while Sandra deals with Ryan's problems by removing Ruby from Charleston. Min Yi looks for another job and is reluctant to accept the only position she is offered.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Slugterra S3
programme.desc: Slugterra is an epic sci-fi comedy adventure set deep underground, where the ammo's alive and only the quick survive! In this luminous, high-tech, underground world every cavern holds a new adventure, new battle and weird little slugs to be discovered!

programme.title: Ollie And Friends 5
programme.desc: The gang decides to put on a shadow puppet show for their friends. The gang use regular-shaped objects to create irregular shapes. Meanwhile Sloppy goes on a glueing spree and causes mayhem!

programme.title: Sesame Street S55

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr2
programme.desc: The series has lots more of the comedy, teamwork, great gadgets (including a brand new vehicle), awesome sights and funky facts about amazing landmarks that young viewers and their parents have come to love. Travelling the world with their teacher, mentor and friend Ubercorn, a disco-grooving unicorn, the Go Jetters are fixing the mishaps caused by the mischievous meddlings of Grandmaster Glitch in new locations including Central Park in New York, Machu Picchu, China, Japan, Mali, and Petra.

programme.title: Lil Wild S3

programme.title: Lil Wild S3
programme.desc: Rara stirs up a storm in the mines against Tyrone, while Bao and Suzie uncover the ancient temple, where the engravings foretold a story of the Megashrews and the Lost World Dinosaurs!

programme.title: Lupin's Tales S1
programme.desc: Lupin dreams of being like the storybook heroes he admires, and goes from one tale to the next to live out their adventures. programme.desc: Shasha and Milo are the newly activated Crescent Island Guardians. programme.desc: 中华民族之所以五千年生生不息绵延不绝就是因为我们的语言文字风俗饮食都是千年传承从来没有中断观众发现以往秦川安秋导演创作的敦煌纪录片都承载了非常厚重的历史文化信息这次的美食片却大不一样从主题定位人物故事叙事方式等都有了非常大的改变叙述风格也生动活泼了很多让观众看到了更多的人间烟火一种田园诗般的美该片通过将敦煌壁画饮食文化呈现出来并将当下敦煌百姓的生活状态一日三餐加工食物的过程忠实记录下来以展现敦煌饮食文化的传承与发展.

programme.title: 锦月如歌
programme.desc: 为保家族爵位何家长女何晏周也饰被迫戴上面具扮做何家嫡长子何如非少年时何晏于贤昌馆初识天之骄子肖珏丞磊饰后为摆脱家族命运毅然离开学馆奔赴沙场多年后何晏荣归故里却因兄长何如非白澍饰回归被家族设计何晏大难不死后转换身份化身城门校尉女儿禾晏女扮男装前往掖州投军立志拿回属于自己的一切禾晏结交了温润如玉的楚昭张康乐饰更是与肖珏再次重逢可肖珏怀疑禾晏是奸细处处针对反复试探禾晏死抱肖珏大腿并以掖州卫第一的成绩向肖珏证明了自己的能力.

programme.title: Gerimis Di Hati Sr 1
programme.desc: As the sole breadwinner with a monthly income of less than 1500, Nizam struggles to care for his wife, Alifah, and two children. Alifah wishes to have her father and handicapped brother stay with her, and Nizam feels immense pressure to earn more money so that the family can upgrade to a bigger apartment. But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

programme.title: Kemelut

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Tuah 13 S4
programme.desc: Tuah 13 returns with for an electrifying Season 4, building on the success of its first three seasons, which boasted stellar ratings and prize money totalling more than 250,000. This season, the series continues its appeal by featuring thrilling rounds, escalating stakes, and the chance for teams to win up to 13,000 in every episode. Open to the public and featuring celebrity guest participants, Tuah13 delivers an electrifying mix of teamwork, strategy, and knowledge. The show covers a diver.

programme.desc: As Syawal draws near, Episode 20 of Warna Ramadan captures the spirit of celebration from every angle. In GAYA, we explore this year's trending Baju Raya colours and patterns, followed by SEMBANG, where Muslim expats share their experiences celebrating Ramadan and Raya in Singapore. HIDANG takes us inside a celebrity home for a special visit, while CABAR features Seriwahyuni Jaes and Mastura Ahmad stepping up to the challenge.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju
programme.desc: Qaisara learns she is not Fatimah's biological child and turns to Maman for answers, only to be exploited for money. Meanwhile, a scorned Linda teams up with Leo to plot the Farouk's downfall.

programme.title: Wanita Syurga
programme.desc: Amar advances in his career and transitions to a new office, where he meets his new boss, Farah, whom he finds obnoxious. He must manage her demands in the workplace.

programme.title: Gerimis Di Hati Sr 1
programme.desc: As the sole breadwinner with a monthly income of less than 1500, Nizam struggles to care for his wife, Alifah, and two children. Alifah wishes to have her father and handicapped brother stay with her, and Nizam feels immense pressure to earn more money so that the family can upgrade to a bigger apartment. But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

programme.title: Jalan Ampas
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Semasa
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S3

programme.title: Remuk
programme.desc: Noor admits her friend sent the anonymous photo of Malik, leading to a public confrontation with Liza that goes viral. As tensions rise, Khairul struggles with his paralysis, Melissa is released from prison, and Cik Samad continues hiding a painful family secret from Noor.

programme.title: Papa Ricky

programme.title: Lap Lip

But the true history goes way back, Alias and his brother Mokhsin were the ones who brought in the electric lap-lip hype to Jalan Hari Raya after moving in from Malaysia. Some miss their parents.

Hosted by vivacious, energetic and lively children host.
